name: Kimi K2.7-Code
summary: Open-weight coding agent you can self-host or hit cheaply via API — it plans, executes, and debugs across long sessions. Trillion-param Mixture-of-Experts weights are on Hugging Face under a commercial-friendly MIT-style license.

name: Claude Fable 5
summary: A new top tier above Opus, with state-of-the-art coding, knowledge work, and vision plus million-token context. Live now on claude.ai, Claude Code, the API, and Bedrock — and free on Pro and Max plans through June 22.

name: Apple Foundation Models free tier
summary: Build AI features into your iOS app and call on-device and cloud models for free if you're a small dev (under 2M lifetime downloads). Now with image input and a Swift API that can route to Claude or Gemini.

name: Nemotron 3
summary: Fully-open model family — the headline for solo builders is Nano, a 4B model with GGUF weights that runs on your laptop, no cloud bill. It scales up to a 550B Ultra reasoner, with training data and recipes open so you can fine-tune.

name: ChatGPT memory upgrade
summary: Memory now revises what it knows about you in the background as your life changes, so recommendations stay current instead of stale. Paid users get double capacity with editable summaries, and real memory is rolling out to free users.
